summary: Read your macOS Calendar schedule in Nucleus with video call links and meeting reminders.

introduced: macOS Calendar integration reads all calendars synced to the Calendar app (Google, iCloud, Exchange, and more)
Dashboard Calendar schedule panel lists upcoming events with Join video call links for Meet, Zoom, Teams, and other services
Calendar access setup in Settings → Notifications with permission guidance
Meeting reminders reschedule automatically from your local calendar events
updated: Shared meeting link extraction for Google Calendar web sync and EventKit sources
